subcodes.first_line: O 'Abdu'lláh! The Wronged One maketh mention of thee—He upon Whom hath descended that which caused the eyes of Glory to shed tears and the Concourse on High to lament [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا عبدالله یذکرک المظلوم الذی ورد علیه ما ذرفت به عیون العظمه و ناح الملا
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
